_comment: Demo mapping for xinput_to_keyboard.py (Controller Bridge) - every input a modern Xbox/PlayStation controller has, all filled in as an example. JSON has no real comment syntax, so this _comment key is just documentation; the loader ignores unrecognized keys, so leaving it here is harmless. Copy this file, rename it, and edit the values (any name the 'keyboard' library's press()/release() accept - see xinput_to_keyboard.py's own module docstring) to build a real mapping - or drop a trimmed-down copy named meridian_controller_bridge.json in a game's own install folder for a per-game override.
